opportunities.title: Digital Transformation and IT Modernization Support — Department of Veterans Affairs
opportunities.description: The VA seeks a contractor to provide agile software development, cloud migration, and IT modernization support for legacy healthcare systems. Contractor shall provide full-stack development (React, Python, AWS GovCloud), DevSecOps pipeline management, and Section 508 compliance testing.

opportunities.title: Data Analytics and Visualization Platform — CMS Innovation Center
opportunities.description: CMS seeks data engineering and BI visualization services to modernize their reporting infrastructure. Work includes ETL pipeline design, Tableau/Power BI dashboards, and real-time data streaming on AWS.

opportunities.title: AI/ML Model Development and Deployment — DHS Science & Technology
opportunities.description: DHS S&T Directorate requires machine learning model development for threat pattern recognition. Python/TensorFlow stack, MLOps pipeline, FedRAMP-compliant cloud deployment required.

opportunities.title: Website Redesign and Accessibility Compliance — GSA Office of Customer Experience
opportunities.description: GSA requires a contractor to redesign their public-facing website portfolio ensuring WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, modern UX design, and CMS integration. React/Next.js preferred.

opportunities.title: Cloud Infrastructure Management and DevSecOps — DoD DISA
opportunities.description: DISA requires DevSecOps support for cloud infrastructure across AWS and Azure environments. Kubernetes orchestration, IaC (Terraform), CI/CD pipeline management, and ATO support.

opportunities.title: IT Consulting and Program Management Support — HHS Office of the CIO
opportunities.description: HHS OCIO seeks IT program management and enterprise architecture consulting support. PMO standup, agile coaching, IT portfolio management, and stakeholder communications.

opportunities.title: Phase II: Machine Learning for Federal Financial Fraud Detection
opportunities.description: SBIR Phase II award opportunity for AI/ML system to detect anomalous financial transactions across federal payment systems.

opportunities.title: AI-Powered Natural Language Processing for Veterans Benefits Processing
opportunities.description: VA seeks NLP solutions to automate benefits claim classification and routing, reducing processing time for veterans. GPT/LLM integration, VA API compatibility required.

opportunities.title: Enterprise Data Warehouse Modernization — Dept. of Education
opportunities.description: Recompete opportunity based on expiring contract award. Current incumbent (small business) held $3.4M contract for data warehouse modernization. Recompete expected Q2 2026.

opportunities.title: Agile Software Development Support — SSA Office of Systems
opportunities.description: SSA requires agile software development support for benefits processing system modernization. Java Spring Boot backend, React frontend, Oracle/PostgreSQL databases, Section 508 compliance.
